Title: Home Page

URL Source: https://www.ferc.gov/

Published Time: Mon, 13 Apr 2026 20:26:34 GMT

Markdown Content:
# Home Page | Federal Energy Regulatory Commission
[Skip to main content](https://www.ferc.gov/#main-content)

[![Image 1: Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Logo](https://www.ferc.gov/themes/custom/ferc/images/FERC_Logo.png)FERC Federal Energy Regulatory Commission](https://www.ferc.gov/ "Federal Energy Regulatory Commission")[Mobile Menu Button](https://www.ferc.gov/#)

*   Search Search

    *   [eTariff * * *](https://www.ferc.gov/)
        *   [Overview](https://www.ferc.gov/ferc-online/etariff)
        *   [Sandbox Electronic Test Site](https://www.ferc.gov/sandbox-electronic-test-site)
        *   [Commission Orders and Notices](https://www.ferc.gov/commission-orders-and-notices-1)
        *   [Instructive Orders](https://www.ferc.gov/instructive-orders)
        *   [Natural Gas Filings](https://www.ferc.gov/ferc-online/etariff/natural-gas-filings)
        *   [Pipeline Tariff Filing Preparation](https://www.ferc.gov/pipeline-tariff-filing-preparation)
        *   [Electric and MBR Step-by-Step Filing](https://www.ferc.gov/industries-data/electric/overview/electric-market-based-rates/initial-applications/step-step-guide-filing-your-application-etariff-system)
        *   [View Individual Tariffs](https://www.ferc.gov/view-individual-tariffs)

        *   [Civil Penalties](https://www.ferc.gov/civil-penalties)
        *   [No Action Letters](https://www.ferc.gov/no-action-letters-0)
        *   [Interest Rates](https://www.ferc.gov/interest-calculation-rates-and-methodology)

    *   Legal

* * *

        *   [Overview](https://www.ferc.gov/legal)
        *   [Federal Statutes](https://www.ferc.gov/federal-statutes)
        *   [Major Orders & Regulations](https://www.ferc.gov/major-orders-regulations)
        *   [Administrative Litigation](https://www.ferc.gov/administrative-litigation-0)
        *   [Alternative Dispute Resolution](https://www.ferc.gov/alternative-dispute-resolution)
        *   [Court Cases](https://www.ferc.gov/court-cases)
        *   [Complaints](https://www.ferc.gov/complaints)
        *   [Settlements](https://www.ferc.gov/enforcement-legal/legal/settlements)
        *   [Memoranda of Understanding (MOU)](https://www.ferc.gov/memoranda-understanding-mou-0)
        *   [Information Collections](https://www.ferc.gov/information-collections)
        *   [No Fear Act](https://www.ferc.gov/no-fear-act)

    *   FOIA

* * *

        *   [Overview](https://www.ferc.gov/foia)
        *   [Freedom of Information Act Guide](https://www.ferc.gov/freedom-information-act-guide)
        *   [Public Reference Service](https://www.ferc.gov/public-reference-service)

    *   CEII

*   [Search](https://www.ferc.gov/#)[Close](https://www.ferc.gov/#)
    *   Search Search

Federal Energy Regulatory Commission

# Working for Reliable & Affordable Power for All

FERC works to ensure reliable, safe, secure & economically efficient energy for consumers at a reasonable cost.

## Quick Links

*   [eLibrary](https://elibrary.ferc.gov/idmws/search/fercgensearch.asp)
*   [Careers at FERC](https://www.ferc.gov/careers)
*   [Open Data Portal](https://data.ferc.gov/)
*   [Meet the Commissioners](https://www.ferc.gov/about/commission-members)
*   [Federal-State Current Issues Collaborative](https://www.ferc.gov/federal-state-current-issues-collaborative)

*   [April Commission Meeting](https://www.ferc.gov/news-events/events/april-16-2026-open-meeting-10082025) April 16, 2026  

## How Affordable is Your Power?

## How Reliable is Your Power?

[### How Affordable is Your Power](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power)

[Residential Cost of Electricity by State](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power)

[![Image 2: Map](https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2025-04/chart%20updated%20v3-03.png)](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power)

[For more information click here](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power)

[### How Reliable is Your Power?](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power#REL)

[Power Outages by State](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power#REL)

[![Image 3: Rates](https://www.ferc.gov/sites/default/files/2025-04/rates%20image.gif)](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power#REL)

[For more information click here](https://www.ferc.gov/how-affordable-and-reliable-your-power#REL)

## What We Regulate

## Federal Energy Regulatory Commission
